stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The wings can be seen out of the aircraft windows as depicted in the annex above. What is happening, and what will be the effect?

options.a: Flap asymmetry; the aircraft will roll to the left.
options.b: Flap asymmetry; the aircraft will yaw to the left.
options.c: Slat asymmetry; the aircraft will roll to the left.
options.d: Slat asymmetry; the aircraft will yaw to the left.
